project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring jump to avoid
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=0 (ground level), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Basic obstacle appearing from game start, avoided by jumping, 40% spawn probability

visual_specification.shape: Single desert cactus with vertical trunk and spikes
visual_specification.texture: pixel art, flat color, no gradients
visual_specification.details: Vertical cactus with visible spikes/thorns, simple silhouette, clearly dangerous appearance, hitbox 31x67px (3px margin for forgiveness)

relationships.shared_with: Same height (70px) as cactus_medium, same color and style as all obstacles
relationships.differences_from: cactus_medium is 68px wide (2 cacti), cactus_large is 102px wide and 100px tall (3 cacti)

explicit_negations: no animation or movement (position changes only)
